description_long: This is a dark wooden table with a rectangular top and elegantly curved legs, giving it a classic and somewhat vintage appearance. The table features a single central drawer on the front side, adorned with a round metallic pull handle. The wood grain is visible across the tabletop, adding a touch of natural texture and richness to its surface. The legs are cabriole-style, flaring outward and then curving inward, which enhances the table's decorative appeal. The finish is glossy, reflecting light and emphasizing the deep brown color of the wood. This table would be suitable for use in a living room, study, or upscale urban environment.
description: A dark, glossy wooden table with curved cabriole legs and a central drawer featuring a round metallic handle. The tabletop has a visible wood grain and a polished finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central drawer with a round metallic pull and the elegant curvature of the front legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the tabletop and the pronounced outward curve of the legs, with no drawer visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, similar to the front but without the drawer or handle, showing the back curvature of the legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with the same leg curvature and tabletop thickness visible.
